title: Aid Groups Flock to Venezuela In Search-and-Rescue Frenzy
summary: Two of the US military ships used in a blockade meant to pressure Nicolás Maduro have headed back toward Venezuela, this time with rescue teams, equipment and medical aid after devastating twin earthquakes struck the country this week.
